title: Building HVAC reference deploy (UI)
description: Golden HVAC install into Operator shell. Prefer full examples/building-hvac-app bundle (marketplace listing may be a catalog stub without operatorUi).
prompt: Install the building-hvac application, open its operator shell, and confirm the zone list screen loads for an operator.
uiJourney: Admin → System → Solutions (Решения) → Install building-hvac → Operator (?mode=operator&app=building-hvac)
humanSteps: Sign in as admin; open System → Solutions (Решения / Marketplace).

Install Building HVAC Reference (appId building-hvac). Prefer a full package with operatorUi — if Operator says UI not found, deploy examples/building-hvac-app/bundle.json via AI Studio Bundle or Application Deploy.
Open /?mode=operator&app=building-hvac and confirm zone list / comfort screens render.
